description_long: This is a tall, rectangular refrigerator with a minimalist, modern design and a matte black finish. It features two vertically stacked doors, with the upper compartment likely serving as a freezer and the lower as the main refrigerator section. Both doors have long, vertical, protruding handles positioned on the left side, providing easy access. The exterior is smooth and unadorned, with no visible branding, control panels, or decorative elements. The sides and back are flat and featureless, emphasizing its utilitarian style. The overall appearance suggests a robust appliance suitable for urban environments such as garages, apartment kitchens, or communal spaces.
description: A matte black, two-door refrigerator with long vertical handles and a minimalist, modern design. The exterior is smooth and unbranded, with no visible controls or decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the upper and lower doors with vertical handles on the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the flat, featureless side panel and the profile of the protruding handles.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, unadorned back with no visible vents or grilles.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the flat side panel and the profile of the handles on the opposite edge.
attribute_door_handle_style: Long, vertical, protruding handles mounted on the left edge of both doors.
